name: @ironforge/workflow-stub-lib
description: Stub-task wrappers for PR-C.2's state-machine end-to-end exercise. Six PR-C.X stubs (validate-inputs replaced at PR-C.3; create-repo / generate-code / run-terraform / wait-for-cloudfront / trigger-deploy / finalize remaining). cleanupStub is NOT a placeholder — it's the real Phase 1 cleanup-on-failure behavior per the PR-C.2 hybrid scope (destroy chain deferred). Deletion trigger: stubTask + finalizeStub consumer counts both at zero — see src/index.ts ledger for current state.

scripts.build: node -e "console.log('@ironforge/workflow-stub-lib: source-only — build is a no-op')"
